mapper.select: select sum(orders.amount) from orders where order_time > #{begin} and orders.order_time < #{end} and status=#{status}
select count(*) from user where create_time > #{begin} and user.create_time < #{end}
select count(*) from orders where order_time > #{begin} and orders.order_time < #{end}
select count(*) from orders where order_time > #{begin} and orders.order_time < #{end} and status=#{status}
select count(*) from orders where order_time > #{begin} and orders.order_time < #{end} and status=#{status}
select count(*) from orders where order_time > #{begin} and orders.order_time < #{end} and status=#{status}
select count(*) from orders where order_time > #{begin} and orders.order_time < #{end} and status=#{status}
